productDisplayName: Levis Kids Girls Alicia White Capris
description: CompositionWhite capris in woven cotton with a soft elastic waist band, soft stretchable fabric gathered at the calves, two side pockets, two back pockets, strong belt loops, branded zipper with Levi's buttons and brand tag stitched to the right hipFitRegular56 cmWash care    Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed    Use mild detergent    Dry cleaning possible    Do not bleach    Avoid soaking    Remove promptly    Dry flat inside out in shade    Iron at medium setting only    Iron on reverse    Wash before wearingThose pants that will make your young girl look like a rock star are finally here. With a wide elastic at the waist and made of soft fabric, your little princess will feel all light and happy in these bottoms. Pair it with a cotton top and a pair of crocs footwear, and there your little girl goes like a doll!
